query: SELECT 'cycle_history' as table_name, COUNT(*) as row_count FROM cycle_history UNION ALL SELECT 'puzzle_attempts', COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts UNION ALL SELECT 'training_sets', COUNT(*) FROM training_sets;
